description: Estimate a Poisson regression model using the Mroz dataset (~/Documents/gretl_data/mroz.gdt) to explain the number of children under age 6 ('kidslt6') using 'const', 'educ', 'age', 'exper', and 'nwifeinc' as regressors. Save the full model estimation output to '~/Documents/gretl_output/poisson_results.txt', export the fitted values to '~/Documents/gretl_output/poisson_fitted.csv', and save the results of an overdispersion test to '~/Documents/gretl_output/dispersion_test.txt'.
